# Decision Records

Numbered, immutable records of *why* the system works the way it does — the rationale behind significant milestones, linked to the commits that implemented them.

**Read [STANDARD.md](STANDARD.md) first** for what a DR is, when to create one, and how. New DRs are scaffolded with `scripts/decision-record.py new "Title"`. This index is regenerated by `scripts/decision-record.py index`.

| DR | Status | Title |
|---|---|---|
| [DR-0001](DR-0001-boris-cherny-config-hardening.md) | Accepted | Harden Claude Code config from Boris Cherny research |
| [DR-0002](DR-0002-decision-record-standard.md) | Accepted | Adopt a Decision Record standard for system milestones |
| [DR-0003](DR-0003-claude-session-model.md) | Accepted | Claude session model — per-window persistence, not a single shared session |
| [DR-0004](DR-0004-audited-correct-state-escape-hatch-for-the-forward-only-task-dag.md) | Accepted | Audited correct-state escape hatch for the forward-only task DAG |
